heading: Sampson Flat vs Sandalwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sampson Flat, South Australia and Sandalwood, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sampson Flat and Sandalwood have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Sampson Flat or Sandalwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sampson Flat has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Sandalwood scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sampson Flat scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Sandalwood scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sampson Flat or Sandalwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sampson Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
